text: Welcome home to this gorgeous, light-filled, 2 bed, 2 bath condo in east Albany Park. The extra-wide layout offers both flow and flexibility. Large primary bedroom features an en-suite bathroom. The second bedroom is well-sized. This home checks all the boxes: CENTRAL AC, IN-UNIT WASHER/DRYER, PRIVATE OUTDOOR SPACE AND PARKING. With exposed brick, hardwood floors, a fireplace, open ductwork, and tons of natural light, the condo brims with charm. Affordable assessments and taxes.
